ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the user profile */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the user */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user profile was last updated */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social Security Number of the user (encrypted) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the user */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the user */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the emergency contact to the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "version")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the insurance company */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the insurance company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the insurance company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the insurance company */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the insurance company */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the insurance company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the insurance company */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the company's logo */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the company is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user associated with the policy */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance company issuing the policy */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance policy (e.g., auto, home) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the policy */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the policy */,
  "premium" TEXT /* Premium amount for the policy */,
  "coverage_amount" TEXT /* Coverage amount for the policy */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the policy (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the policy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the policy was last updated */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Unique policy number assigned by the insurance company */,
  "coverage_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the coverage */,
  "deductible" TEXT /* Deductible amount for the policy */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the policy is due for renewal */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Indicates whether the policy has been renewed */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, direct debit) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the policy is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy associated with the claim */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user filing the claim */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was filed */,
  "claim_amount" TEXT /* Amount claimed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the claim */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the claim was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the claim was last updated */,
  "claim_number" TEXT /* Unique claim number assigned by the insurance company */,
  "claim_status_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the claim's status */,
  "adjuster_id" TEXT /* ID of the adjuster handling the claim */,
  "claim_documents" TEXT /* URLs of documents related to the claim */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the claim is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, policy update, claim submission) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the activity */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the log entry is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the role belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the role is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user assigned the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was assigned */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the role assignment belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the role assignment is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was created */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the notification belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department's responsibilities */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the department is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)
